content:
# elizaos-plugins/registry Daily Update (Apr 14, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on April 14 focused on stabilizing the release pipeline. The team successfully resolved recurring failures in the `NPM Release` workflow by implementing fixes for package builds, submodule handling, and release serialization. Additionally, new plugin integration efforts were initiated.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

**Release Pipeline Stabilization**
* Resolved build and publication blocks by ignoring dirty plugin submodules and unblocking release builds for published packages.
* Implemented workflow serialization and deduplication to prevent non-fast-forward push failures caused by concurrent release jobs.
* Added retry logic for git pushes following rebase operations to ensure release stability.

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
* [#340](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/pull/340): Add @blueprint.xyz/plugin-solentic
* [#339](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/pull/339): Add @blueprint.xyz/plugin-solentic
* [#338](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/pull/338): Add @blueprint.xyz/plugin-solentic to registry

## CLOSED ISSUES

**Resolved Release Workflow Failures**
* Addressed multiple release failures (v2.0.0-alpha.140 through v2.0.0-alpha.150) by applying build and package publication fixes: [#6734](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/issues/6734), [#6735](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/issues/6735), [#6736](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/issues/6736), [#6737](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/issues/6737), [#6739](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/issues/6739), [#6740](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/issues/6740), [#6741](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/issues/6741), [#6742](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/issues/6742), [#6745](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/issues/6745), [#6746](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/issues/6746).

**Resolved Concurrent Release Race Conditions**
* Fixed non-fast-forward push errors and duplicate issue spam for v2.0.0-alpha.156 and v2.0.0-alpha.160: [#6747](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/issues/6747), [#6748](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/issues/6748), [#6749](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/issues/6749), [#6750](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/issues/6750), [#6751](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/issues/6751), [#6752](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/issues/6752), [#6753](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/issues/6753), [#6754](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/issues/6754), [#6755](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/issues/6755).

## NEW ISSUES
* None.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
* None.
